14.30: ane beyana, ‘Ondo ona wa bora o sowa odo o eo na wa ta wa ama o mara me ne.’
14.31: “Nyimia kanza ogomo waya ale a kara ka ogomo yende. Wa gwara o bekaana wa cikǝ a wa soleke aromo magu betuuru, ne era ne eze o kara ka aromo magu tuuru leere na?
14.32: Wato ama ne, wayo tonga ana ondo ogomo omea neya gwarnang a kara ka wai a wa tata a macangcang kawa gere o cikǝ o cammo.
14.33: Nyimia kanza, pate ondooka wata cikǝ a wa bale epa eka eya malo o tare ong ne a wa baya e keeya emea waye ka ene, wa era wata itǝ ondo tare ong ne.
14.34: “Ogalu lento, wa arnang ka o lento wai, ara wiinia ka ote wai kawa kang lento?
14.35: Wa era wata kang eza okang eyapa ne, soona a oke wai, nyimia wayo za, ondooka wata cikǝ a wa bale epa eka e tare malo o tare ong ne. “Ekena teto epa eka eya konaza ne.”

15.1: Nangka ana o eesa emate makeke ka ana madinǝ ne de kane kone Yeso aka ya baala.
15.2: Na maParisa ka ana o baala ngmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa, ne bore agbwero na, “Karomo kaana ka itǝ kaja kana madinǝ nangka kaya lya epaolya kaa ne.”
15.3: Na Yeso bele ne angmǝ a gerpo na,
15.4: “A mana a ondo o ying waye ka emande e peng lewinu naka yende wili. A wata baya e tuuru torai ka o torai ara o lya mawake, a wa ale kawa gere kayende kamea ka wilǝ seeka wa cǝ kai sang?
15.5: A wa cǝ kai, a wa kone o leba, a wa ana kai o gagaru
15.6: a wa ale ka kai akwilǝ. A wa rare ejaa wai, ka andaame ne cikǝ legwa ka wai, a wa bekaana, ‘Kangkamanna o kona o leba aza kamande kapeng ka kaa wilǝ na ma cǝ kai.’
15.7: Eyang baale o ying, nyimia a yo kona o leba a cake azaa shili azaa ondo madinǝ oyende kawa kuri ara Ashili, kawa kala aromo tuuru torai ko torai ka ne ta ne laka edang o kurǝ a Ashili ne. Angmǝ a gerpo aza emate eka e wilǝ
15.8: “A mana ondaye waye ka emate eyo emate betuuru , na be yende wili, wayo diki beru be masanto, a wa beshe akwilǝ me, a wa eke oto a soola me kawa zenga wa cǝ.
15.9: Wa cǝ be, a wa kurki ejaa wai, ka andaame ne cikǝ legwa, a wa bekaana, ‘Kankamang na o kona o leba, nangka ma cǝ bemate beng beeka be wilǝ.’
15.10: Eyang baale o ying, nyimia a Ashili ka atoma ai o zaa shili neya za o zanta, a were aka ondo madinǝ wa kurǝ ara Ashili.” Angmǝ gerpo azaa kena ka o wili ka a cǝ kai
15.11: Na Yeso lya izi ka o beya angmǝ a gerpo na, “Oromo yende wa zene ka waye ka ayana a lome a leere.
15.12: Na kabaate kame beka ate ane na, ‘Ate, nyang bengmǝ beng a nyimia akwilǝ na.’ Na ate me are komana one bengmǝ be wai.
15.13: “Malo nyimi a ta a rabo maleo ne, na kena kabaate kame shende pate epa eka a nya kai aa ka baya akwilǝ me. Naka ale a makeke ma yende ma macangcang. A sanamea ka ale naka wilǝrǝ ocǝ o kai a pate a lya o bere zora epa edang.
15.14: Malo omea ka mare keeya ka ka zene, na e komo e gong e lyǝ a makeke mame, na kena kame lyǝ nyimi o dera maleo.
15.15: Naka ale a gera ogole o eza ara oromo yende a nyimi makeke mame, na oromo me turki kai a gole ara e dembashe e akwilǝ e wai, aza o bekaana ka ka soole ne aka nyaza ne epaolya.
15.16: Aza o burǝ ekomo ka e meke kai, naka gere o lya mabutu mamea e dembashe e akwilǝ neya lyame, na ondo ta nya kai ne.
15.17: “Nangka ka kuri a madoola ma woma, naka bekaana, ‘Eya eena eeyang eza me? Azara ate ang neye ka epaolya kane ta rosa epa o eza ka ee ne, a mi naana ba gbwǝ ka e komo.
15.18: Eyang era kang kuri ba ra ate ang, kang bekaa wai na, Ate, ma ya madinǝ ara Ashili, a ma wilǝ ara au kanza.
15.19: Nannamena anta bare a kang rarang na kena kau ne. Kuriyang kang itǝ na oyende a nyimia na o ezaza oo ogole.’
15.20: Naka ere aka meke orona o kurǝ ara ate a kai. “Aka tata a macangcang, na ate a kai laka kai, na wa rose kai, a wa kone egonegone kai, nyimia na wa song a wa ale ara a kai, na wa meke kena kame a wa kang gambare kai.
15.21: “Na kena kame bekaana, ‘Ate, ma ya madinǝ ara Ashili a ma wilǝ a bo kanza. Nannamena anta bare a kang rarenna kena kau ne.’
15.22: “A nyimi o zanta na ate me rare azara akwilǝ o wai na wa bekaana, ‘Yangkanna na ka ede ka o dibi o rere ka e amba kai. E amba kai becapa a lebo ka tekakau a tobona.
15.23: A e de ka bena be mole benname ka core, ka lye a zante.
15.24: Aza o bekaana kena kaana kakang, mashe bena kagbwi na kakang kurǝ, mashe bena ka wili na a kang cǝ kai.’ Nane zante maleo.
15.25: “A were name, kena ka wai ka gong kamea ka ale ara, a ka ya za o kurǝ akwilǝ. Nangka ka amara ka akwilǝ, aaka kone aya gwara o guulung ka o yowa leera.
15.26: Na ka rare ozara akwilǝ me oyende, na ka pirkǝ wai epa eka eya za o ale.
15.27: Na ozara me bekaana, ‘Ondadimǝ o waya wa deya, waya ate au wa ote na a core bena be mole beena, aza o bekaana ondadimǝ o me wa kurǝ akwilǝ zak.’
15.28: “Ka o kona nyimi na ondaaizi me kone o burǝ cak, a wa nyana o lyǝ akwilǝ. Na ate ane suri na wa nya wai angmǝ a wa bose wai na wa lyǝ nyimi akwilǝ.
15.29: Na wa kabare ate wai na, ‘Lakai. A nyimi shenai sheena, ma ezau ogole na ozara, anta ma tukǝ nyana epa eka ba tukǝ bekaana ang ye ne. Pate ka nyimi ota tukǝ nya ong kabanaa kamande kang rare ejaa ang kate deya te lye a te eze ozǝnggǝ ne ma.
15.30: A nangka kena kaana kakau kamea ka ale naka wilǝrǝ ocǝ kai aza andaye o cikǝ okpwe one, ka kurǝ, ba core kai bena be mole beeme.’
15.31: “Na ate me bekaa kai na, ‘Kena kang, teye legwa ka bo koonang lengme pate epa eka ang zene a ewa e.
15.32: A epa e rere e obekaana te zanta, a te cǝ lenyong lee sano, aza o bekaana orone o oona tese bena wa gbwi na nannamena wa kurǝ, tese bena wa wili na a cǝ wai.’ ”

16.1: Yeso ka bele atoma kai angmǝ a gerpo na, “Ondo wa zene oka waye ka ocǝ ka ondo soola ocǝ o wai ka a ana wai angmǝ na wa kpwizizi ocǝ ate akwilǝ me.
16.2: Na ate akwilǝ me rare ondo soola me a wa pirkǝ wai na, ‘Eya eyang konaza me aza au? Nyang kazo ekeeya aza ogole o, oto kang itǝ ondo soola ocǝ ong ne.’
16.3: “Na ondo soola me beke a lenyong le wai na, ‘Ate akwilǝ ong ya tarangga ong ara ogole, eya eyang yame? Mi naana anta ama ogole legoone ne, ang kang ya ka ezǝng e lebose.
16.4: Ang rose epa eka eyang yame zongka ang baya arakana, ka a taranggang ara ogole ong, a were name aromo neyo embang a tokwilǝ to ne.’
16.5: “Nyimia wa rare komaname ka ate akwilǝ tare wai oduru. Nawa pirkǝ ondo bora na, ‘Nannia ate akwilǝ ang wa taro.’
16.6: “Nawa bekaana, ‘Magbwi shewinu riiru ma manao.’ “Na ondo o soola ocǝ me bekaa wai na, ‘Cikǝ nannamena o wele na a taro magbwi shewinu she naaze.’
16.7: “Nawa kang pirkǝ ondo, ‘A bo nannia taro?’ “Na wai kanza wa bekaana, ‘Magadasa ugu yende o alkama.’ “Na ondo soola ocǝ me bekaana, ‘Emba epa eka a wela tera o ying ka o kuriyǝ kawa itǝ shewinu riiru.’
16.8: “Na ate akwilǝ me sabe ondo soola ocǝ o wai na, Ang rose na ba kpwizizi ocǝ ong, pate ka nyimi ba wore o ama aza o lya izi o. Nyimia aromo amea neta nyimi masanto ne, neye ka o ama o cak o cikǝ ka aromo abelo ane, ka ne kala aromo amea neya masanto o ama.
16.9: Na Yeso lya izi ka o bekaana, Eyang beya ying na, ezana ogole ka ocǝ o ying ka e gere tokpwe toying ejaa. Nyimia ocǝ name ka wa to ale ka ying o maare ne, Ashili a yo emba ying a tokwilǝ to dera o maro.
16.10: “Nyimia ondooka wa eza edang aza ocǝ o baate, a yo eke wai ba za ocǝ o gong, kanza ondooka wata eza edang aza ocǝ o baate ne, wa era wata eza edang aza ocǝ o gong ne.
16.11: Eeta eza edang aza ocǝ a lerambo le Ashili leena ne, a wiinia a Ashili kabare ka o nya o ying ocǝ edang?
16.12: Kanza eeta e tukǝ eza edang aza o soola magogoro ma ondo ne, a wiinia a Ashili nya ying maaka maye maying?
16.13: “Oromo wa era wata ama eza lezara ara ate akwilǝ a leere ne. Waya nyimi a wa nyane ondo a wa yeme ondo, wa era wa kang kabare ka oyende a wa zeele o leere me. Ba era o ta ote lenyong ba Ashili ka emate ne.”
16.14: MaParisa andaaka ne yeme emate, aza o kona epa eka Yeso ka beka, nane ye becorte.
16.15: Naka bekaa ne na, “Yingnga ana o ote aromo kane laka na e tare Ashili ka edang, a Ashili rose anyong aying. Pate magogoro maame aromo yeme, maye Ashili ta yeme o laka mai ne. Legoone zene a cak a nyimi angmǝ Ashili
16.16: “Obaala Mosa ka ana o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili, a lya izi ka o baala me a deya a were a Yohana o batisma. O era a were a Yohana a zoole aza angmǝ lebo a togomo te Ashili, a komaname ya gera ocǝ o lyǝ a nyimi me.
16.17: Wa kala o bekaana a deze ka za a shili maro ka o bekaana beyo be wela be yende be dere legoone a nyimi a pate angmǝ a Ashili.
16.18: “Nangka a wele angmǝ Ashili na, Pate ondooka wa pere ondaye wai, a wa ana oyende, waya eza leyau naname, a nyimi a pate ondooka wa ana ondaye oka wa pere ondaleme wai, leyauwa waya eza me ka wai. Angmǝ a gerpo aza ondo ocǝ ka Liyazaru malo gbwǝ one
16.19: “Yeso ka bele ne angmǝ a gerpo na, Aye ondo ocǝ yende ka wa ambaza madibi maa rere nangka agomo ka ana emate ambaza, kanza a wa cikǝ o leba a koonang lengme.
16.20: Abuudu akwilǝ wai ondo wa ciisǝ ne kaa rareze wai na Liyazaru ondo lebose, a edara ka ma'aza susi a pate lepung le wai,
16.21: a wa ya gera pate manyesakarong maaka ma tǝǝruzu a deze araaka ondo ocǝ wa lyeeze epaolya ne. E ere o wake ne deese ane lembeze ma gwahu ma wai.
16.22: “Na a were de aka Liyazaru wa gbwi na Atoma Ashili o zaa shili ne de nane ana wai, ane nya wai aro cikǝ a rere ating Ibraheng. Ondo ocǝ me na wa kang gbwi na taase wai.
16.23: Akwilǝ ola araaka wa kone o poba ne, na wa ara yizi azaa shili na wa laka Ibraheng a Liyazaru a cikǝ ting wai.
16.24: Nawa rare na, ‘Ate Ibraheng, kona egonegone ong ka otong Liyazaru kawa ote lebo a nyimi manyi kawa tenkeng a lelengleng adorana lezi, eyang kona a huuwu a nyimi ola ona.’
16.25: “Na Ibraheng kabare na, ‘Kena, rintǝ a were amea baya lerambo le Ashili baye ka magogoro ma rere, a Liyazaru wata waye ka epa e rere ne. Nanname waya kona o leba a bo oya kona o burǝ.
16.26: Malo nyimi apat, a tera aro ka bo le'o le gerpo zene. Ondo wa era awata deya ara ying ne kanza ondo wa era awa ta deya ara aro ne.’
16.27: “Na ondo ocǝ name bekaana, ‘Nyimi waaza eyang bosa o ate Ibraheng, ka otong Liyazaru akwilǝ te ang,
16.28: o bena eyang ka arone esu andaleme, kawa nya ne angmǝ kana neema ne deya ara o poba a buru na ne.’
16.29: “Na Ibraheng bekaana, ‘Arone au neya ka andaaka neyo baala ne. Neye ka angmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa, ka angmǝ ana o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili, ane kone ne.’
16.30: “Na ondo ocǝ wa kabare na, ‘Nyimia tazane ate Ibraheng. Ondo wa era o cau kawa ale ane yo kurǝ a Ashili.’
16.31: “Na Ibraheng bekaana, ‘Neta kona angmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa ka ewela ana o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili ne, ondo wa era o ocau ma neto kona wai ne.’ ”

17.1: Na Yeso beke ana o tare o kai na, “O kedeya zene koonang were, a ondooka wa itǝ orona o nyimi, wa lyǝ udi.
17.2: Mara a tere ondo name lecale lo nyanto a lengmelo a tare wai a nyimi lepung, ka o bena wa ote ondo a nyimi ayana ana kane rizi a madinǝ.
17.3: Azaa nyimi, ezana a sauwo ka tokpwe to ying. “Ondooka o rose wa kala madinǝ, zurki a wai, a wa konau, o pisi epa emea wa yau a lenyong.
17.4: A wa caro o nyong ka o sondaare a lengme, a koonang oya nyimi a wa deya bo na, ‘Ma ya epa e buru, kwizǝng madinǝ mang.’ O pisi wai a lenyong lo.”
17.5: Na atoma Yeso bekaa kai na, “Ahh. Wala ro o kabare ka Ashili ne.”
17.6: Naka kabare na, “Eeya ka o kabare ka Ashili na o beyo be o mustad ka beya kala be baate, e era e bekaa uti o gong ona na ‘Wa mukurunu kawa ale kawa gata okpwe wai a lepong,’ a wa ye nyimi.
17.7: “A ondo o ying waya ka ozara kawa eze wai abara ka ena, kona wa soole wai emande epeng. Mana a nyimi o ying wa surǝ ara a wa beka ozara me na, ‘Deya arakana a saseya ka o cikǝ o lye ka mi?’
17.8: Wato bekaana, ‘Sele e mete, o ende, ma lya ang kang sa, malo me a bo o kang lya o se?’
17.9: Wa era a wa zante ka ozara me aza o bekaana wa ya epa eka a beka wai na wa ezea belle na?
17.10: Nyimia ying kanza, malo eza epa eka a bekaana e eze, eyo bekaana, ‘Aro azara o dera ama ai, te eza ogole oroa belle.’ ” Yeso ka womza agangca betuuru
17.11: A Yeso ka ya orona o ale apeng a Urushalima, naka kale a bekazo be makeke ma Samariya ka ma Galili.
17.12: Nangka kaya lyǝ a kapeng ka yende, a aromo betuuru ka neye ka leganca, ane itǝ a macangcang ka kai,
17.13: ane rare kai ka lengmelo a jǝng na, “Yeso ondo ogong, kona egonegone ero.”
17.14: Naka laka ne aka bekaana, “Ale na ka e wore tokpwe to ying ara na magame ma Ashili.” Nangka ne ale, na pisi ne leganca le ne.
17.15: Ondo a nyimi one nangka wa laka a wa woma, na wa kuri, a wa saba Ashili ka lengmelo a jǝng.
17.16: Na wa girwǝ ating tobona te Yeso, a wa kone o leba kai, a wai oromo o makeke ma Samariya waye.
17.17: Na Yeso pirkǝ na, “Aromo betuurua a womza sang? O dangare o torai ome ya baba?
17.18: Ondo one tawa kuri kawa sabe Ashili ne soona o geng ona na?”
17.19: Naka beka a wai na, “Era ka o ale, o kabare ka Ashili au wa wongzau.” O baala Yeso aza o cikǝ o woma a kazo deya kai
17.20: Ngmende maParisa ne pirkǝ Yeso na, “Ngmǝyamea togomo te Ashili ya deya?” Na Yeso kabare na, “Togomo te Ashili teta deesa ka nangka eya doola o laka te ne,
17.21: aromo ne era ane ta bekaana, ‘Ateena, kona ateniini ne,’ aza o bekaana togomo te Ashili teya tera oying.”
17.22: Naka beke ana o tare o kai na, “A were aya deya ka eyo yeme o laka lengme le yende a nyimi shengme she Kena ka Oromo, pate ka nyimi eto laka lee ne.
17.23: Aromo neyo bele ying na, ‘Kaya ka niini, kona kaya kaana.’ Kana e tare nee ne.
17.24: Lengme le Kena ka Oromo, ya deya a yizi komana nangka mawere malmizi, ama nya masanto a kuruwǝ azaa shili ka koonang bekazo.
17.25: Zongka aye nyimi Kena ka Oromo kayo zitǝ cak kanza aromo a were aana, ne kang nyana kai.
17.26: “Nangka waze a tomore te Ogonggong Nuhu, nyimi wayo za a tomore te Kena ka Oromo.
17.27: A nyimi o nyana a Ashili one, a aromo neya lyeeza, ane sosoza, a anza andaye asau, andaye kang aleze a todo na dukǝ lengme leeka Ogonggong Nuhu wa lyǝ a nyimi o onggo manyi o gong. Zora o rosa saseya na o wena manyi mame zale nama wonge aromo a pate.
17.28: “Nyimia waze aza o nyana a Ashili a tomore te Lotu. Aromo neya lyelyeza, ane sosoza, neya eesa, ane lisizi, neya gasa ebelo ane sooze todo.
17.29: Lengme leeka Lotu wa baya apeng a Saduma, zora orosa na ola ka arantaane wai a japi a surǝ azaa shili na wonze aromo a pate a lengme leme.
17.30: “Azaa o nyana a Ashili aromo a wereena, nyimia wayo za zora o rosa one lengme leeka Kena ka Oromo kayo wore okpwe kai.
17.31: A lengme leng name ondo waya aza akwilǝ a wai, ka magogoro ma wai a nyimi kwilǝ me, kana wa japi kawa jeke mai ne. Nyimia, ondo waya o wake, kana wa kuri akwilǝ a kazo jeka magogoro ma wai ne.
17.32: Rintǝ epa eka e mana ondaye o Lotu.
17.33: Pate ondooka wa yeme ebeene wai wayo dera e, ondooka wa dera ebeene wai aza ong, wayo cǝ e.
17.34: “Ang bele ying, a lengme lo deya ong, aromo leere neyo ya ara o tete yende, a yo jeka ondo a baya ondo.
17.35: A yo mana andaye leere a nyanta eroko legwa, a yo jeka ondo a baya ondo.”
17.36: A yo mana andaleme leere ara a ogole, a yo jeka ondo a baya ondo.
17.37: Nane pirkǝ na, “A ruwǝme Ateokora?” Naka kabare ne ka angmǝ a gerpo na, “Ara a ka e keze zene, arakanamea ejogale kurkǝnǝzǝng ne.”

18.1: Na Yeso beke atoma kai angmǝ a gerpo adorana ka wore ne obena ne gwara ane beye angmǝ ka Ashili a gweregwere kana ne poro anyong ne.
18.2: Naka bekaana, “Apeng yende ondo cora angmǝ wa zene, oka wata ka boome ba Ashili ne, kanza awata bala aromo ne.
18.3: A ondaye yende wa zene apeng ame, omea ogbwǝri waze, na wa aleze a ondo o cora ngmǝ ba gweregwere kale bose na, ‘Nyang epa eka e gwara a tera ong ka ondo nyana ong.’
18.4: “O bora na wa nyane. Malo oka ondaye me wa gare wai a deesa a gweregwere, na wa beka okpwe wai na, ‘Pate ka o bekaana anta kona boome ba Ashili ne, kanza anta bala aromo ne.
18.5: Aza o bena ondaye ona wa garang ka o deesa a gweregwere, eyang ya wai epa eka e gwara aye wai, adorana wa bayang ang teeseke.’ ”
18.6: Na Ateokora me ka bekaana, “Kona na epa eka ondo o cora ngmǝ oka wata kona boome ba Ashili ne wa beke.
18.7: Ashili a era a ta nya andaaka wa Zaka ne epa eka e gwara ka neya gera me a wai a letereme kale lyaare ne? Wayo nyana o nya one na?
18.8: Eyang baala o ying, wayo nya epa e rere ba kwarte. Nyimia waaza, a were aka Kena ka Oromo ka deya, kayo cǝ ondooka wa kabare ka kai a lerambo le Ashili na?” Angmǝ a gerpo aza o ondo o ara okpwe ka ondo o nata okpwe
18.9: Yeso ka beke angmǝ a gerpo aza aromo aka ne jeka tokpwe tone o bena neye ka boome ba Ashili kanza ane zeele o dangare aromo.
18.10: Naka bekaana, “Anda leere ne ale ba akwilǝ Ashili kane beye angmǝ ka Ashili. Ondo o bora oParisa wai, a o leere me ondo o eesa emate makeke wai.
18.11: Na oParisa me wa ere a itǝ, na wa bore o beya ngmǝ ka Ashili a wa beye na, ‘Ashili ma zanta ka bo o bena mi anta ya na o dangare aromo ne. Anta ya na akǝri, ana o irizi aromo, ana o gera andaye aromo, mi anta ya na oromo ona ondo o eesa emate makeke ne.
18.12: A nyimi le sondaare le yende, ang pateze ongmǝ ka leere, ang nyaza be yende a nyimi be tuuru o cǝ ong.’
18.13: “Ondo o eesa emate makeke na wa itǝ a macang. Wata wa ara okpwe ka wa laka azaa Ashili ne, a wa beye na, ‘Ashili kona egonegone ong, mi ondo madinǝ wai.’ ”
18.14: Na Yeso bekaana, “Eyang baala o ying, ondo o eesa emate makeke wa kurǝ ba akwilǝ a wai ka o bena Ashili a kwizǝ madinǝ ma wai, wata na oParisa ne. Pate ondooka wa ara okpwe wai, a yo nata wai. Ondo oka wa nata okpwe wai, a yo ara wai.” O nata okpwe na kabana a kena waya Ashili yeme
18.15: Na aromo ne deese ka ayana ane ara a Yeso adorana ka eke ne taara kane cǝ o leba. Ka o laka o nyimi na atoma kai, ne zurki ane.
18.16: Na Yeso ka rare a bana ayana me, aka bekaa atoma a kai na, “Baya na a bana yana ane deye a mi, tana e nare ne ne, togomo te Ashili tatone te.
18.17: Ang bele ying epeng eme, pate ondooka wata kabare ka togomo te Ashili nangka ka bana kena ka kabare ne, wa era wata lyǝ ba nyimi o te ne.” Ondo ocǝ ka wa nyane Yeso
18.18: Ondoono dandaro o gwarzanang maYahuda yende wa pirkǝ Yeso na, “Ondo o baala o lenyong le sangsang, ma wiini a ang cǝ ebeene odera o maro?”
18.19: Na Yeso pirkǝ wai na, “Eyaka oya beya mi na ondo o baala o lenyong le sangsang, ondo o baala o lenyong le sangsang ta zene ne, Ashili aya belle ondo o baala o lenyong le sangsang.
18.20: O rose epa eka angmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa wa wele, ‘Tana o eze leyau ka andaye ne, tana o wong ondo ne, tana o eze bekǝri ne, tana o beye majakari aza ondo ne, nya ate ka iini o togomo tene.’ ”
18.21: Na oromo me bekaana, “Ma tare epa eka a beka pate a were ame ma tata ka bana kena.”
18.22: Ka o kona nyimi, na Yeso bekaa wai na, “Epa e yendea tata ka ba dera. Lisǝ epa eka oye ka e ba pate, ka o areseze ana o dera, oyo itǝ ondo le'eke a cake aza shili. O de ka o tareng.”
18.23: Nangka wa kone nyimi, na lenyong le wai caro aza o bekaana, waya ka ocǝ a cake.
18.24: Ka o laka lenyong le wai a le caro, na Yeso bekaana, “Wayo poba a cak ana ocǝ ne lyǝ a togomo te Ashili.
18.25: Mara o rankome wa lyǝ a le'o le beberkena aza o bena, ondo ocǝ wa lyǝ a togomo te Ashili.”
18.26: Aromo amea ne kone orooka ona nane pirkǝ kai na, “Nyimia waaza, mana wa era a wa cǝ o boza?”
18.27: Na Yeso kabare na, “Epa eka e kala legoone le aromo, eta kala legoone le Ashili ne.”
18.28: Na Biturusu bekaana, “Gwukuu. Aro naana a te baya tokwilǝ tero ka e keeya a te taro.”
18.29: Na Yeso bekaana, “Eyang dongdong bele o ying, ondo ta zene omea wa baya akwilǝ wai, ka ondaye, ka arone, ka anate, ka ayana, aza ogole o togomo te Ashili,
18.30: a wa dera ocǝ magogoro nanname. A izi a wa kang cǝ ebeene o dera o maro ne.” Yeso ka beke orooka aza o gbwǝ o kai
18.31: Na Yeso ale ka atoma kai ba e daki, naka bekaa ne na, “Teya zala a ale a Urushalima, a sanamea angmǝ aka ana o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili, ne wele aza Kena ka Oromo a yo pena.
18.32: A yo nya kai a legoone le taara te Aworme. Neyo zeela kai, ane eseze kai, ane kareze kai mawo. Ane ole kai ane kang wonga kai.
18.33: Malo nyimi a lengme lo taaro aka ere.”
18.34: A atoma kai neta ne cǝ masanto ma epa eka ka baale ne ne. Masanto mame a baasa ba ne, neta ne rose epa eka ka baale ne ne. Urǝ oka wa ezeze lebose wa cǝ o gonta ra
18.35: A were aka Yeso ka amara ka apeng a Yariko, a urǝ yende waya cikǝ ba e daki be orona a wa eze lebose.
18.36: Nangka wa kone aromo aneya kala, na wa pirkǝ epa emea eya ale.
18.37: Na beka wai na, “Yeso karomo ka apeng Nazarat kaya ya kala.”
18.38: Nawa rare ka lengmelo a jǝng na, “Yeso kena ka abuudu a Daoda kona egonegone eng.”
18.39: Aromo amea neya izi nane zurki wai na wa kome, na wa wale o ara lengmelo ba jǝng kanza, a wa beya na, “Kena ka buudu a Daoda, kona egonegone eng.”
18.40: Na Yeso itǝ aka ote na a de ka oromo ome ara kai. Nangka wa deya ma'amo na Yeso pirkǝ wai na,
18.41: “Eya oya yeme ang ezo?” Na urǝ ome kabare na, “Ateokora, eyang yeme ang cǝ o gonta ara.”
18.42: Na Yeso beke a wai na, “Cǝ o gonta ara, o kabare ka Ashili au wa wongzau.”
18.43: Ka o beka o Yeso nyimi, a wa ong cǝ o gonta ara a saseya, na wa tare kai, a wa sabe Ashili. Nangka aromo ne laka nyimi, na pate one ne sabe Ashili.

19.1: Yeso ka lyǝ a Yariko, aka ya kala a nyimi apeng naname,
19.2: na ondooka beya wai na Zaka, oromo ogong a nyimi ana o eesa emate makeke, wai ondo ocǝ kanza.
19.3: Wa gere o laka o bena mana Yeso, na wata ama ne, aza o bena aromo ne gong arame, a wai kanza waya kpwentiring.
19.4: Nawa lyǝ izi kato song, na wa zala uti o urǝrǝ orona ka Yeso kaya kala arame, adorana wa cǝ wa laka kai.
19.5: Nangka Yeso ka dukǝ rame, naka ara okpwe naka beka wai na, “Zaka, jipi a saseya, o ngmeengme, akwilǝ au wa eyang dongdong jipi ne.”
19.6: Nawa jipi a kwarte, a wa embe kai ka lenyong leyende.
19.7: Nangka aromo ne laka nyimi, na pate one bebeya a tokpwe tone, nane bekaana, “Gwukuu. Ka jipi akwilǝ ondo madinǝ.”
19.8: Na Zaka ere a itǝ, na wa bekaa Ateokora na, “Ateokora, laka. Nannamena pate epa eka eyang ka e eyang ara a tera kang nya ana o dera, a pate ondooka ma iri wai, eyang kuriyǝ wai ka naaze epa eka ma emba a wai.”
19.9: Yeso ka beka wai na, “Ngmeengme na, o boza wa lyǝ akwilǝ ana, o bekaana ba kurǝ a Ashili kanza bo kena ka akora na Ibraheng wai.
19.10: Kena ka Oromo ka deya dakememe a gera epa eka e wilǝ, ka ka boza e kanza.” Angmǝ a gerpo aza o eza ogole ka edang
19.11: Nangka neya konaza epa me, na Yeso ka lyǝ izi ka o baala one angmǝ a gerpo, aka ya ma'amo ka o Urushalima, aneya madoola ma o bena togomo te Ashili taya wore okpwe te nannamena.
19.12: Naka bena, “Oromo yende akwilǝ togomo wa ale a makeke ma yende ma macangcang adorana a nya wai togomo zongka wa kuri.
19.13: Nawa rare azara wai betuuru, na wa nya komana one emate, a wa kang bekaa ne na, ‘Wangara na emate me seeka ma kuri.’
19.14: “Na aromo apeng wai ne nyane wai, nyimia nane tong atoma a malo wai ara ondooka waye ka o bare o nya wai togomo kane bekaana, ‘Teta yeme oromo ona a wa itǝ ogomo oro ne.’
19.15: “Pate ka nyimi na nya wai togomo, malo oka wa cǝ te na wa kuri, a wa ote na a rare wai azara name ka wa nya ne emate, ka wa laka epa eka ne cǝ aza o wangara me.
19.16: “Na obora me de a wa bekaana, ‘Ondoogong, bemate be yende beeka ba nyang be windi emate betuuru.’
19.17: “Nawa kabare ozara me na, ‘Gajeya, ozara ogashe. Nangka ba wore edang aza epa e baate, ma nyau togomo to apeng betuuru.’
19.18: “Na o leere ome de, na wa bekaana, ‘Ondoogong, bemate beka ba nyang be windi emate esu.’
19.19: “Nawa kabare wai na, ‘Bo kanza ma nyau togomo to apeng esu.’
19.20: “Kanza na oyende de na wa bekaana, ‘Ondoogong emba bemate bo. Mashe tere e a kajembelea, nang baasa suk.
19.21: Aza o bena eyang kona boome bo, obena bo o pobe. O jeeze epa eka ota ba eke ne o kang shende epa eka ota ba gata ne.’
19.22: “Na ondoogong me kabare na, ‘Bo ozara a ara a buru. Eyang core o angmǝ aza epa eka ba beka, O rose bena mi oromo o poba, ondo omea wa jeeze epa eka wata wa eke ne, ang kang shende epa eka anta ma gata ne?
19.23: Nyimia waaza, eyaka ota ba eke emate eng ara o eese emate ne, ka ma kurǝ ang cǝ eyapa azame ne?’
19.24: “Nawa beka aromo ka neya itǝ arame, ‘Emba na bemate beena a wai ka e nya ondoname ka waya ka e betuuru.’
19.25: “Nane beka wai na, ‘Ondoogong, wa ya ka emate betuuru pa.’
19.26: “Eyang baala o ying, pate ondooka waye ka eyapa cake, a yo wala wai ne, ondooka waye ka eya baate kanza, a embe kapa ka mea waya ka kai.
19.27: A ana o nyana ong ka neta yeme ong na ang eze togomo aza one ne, deya na ka ne arakana ka e wongze ne ang yang gonta.” Yeso ka lyǝ a Urushalima na ogomo
19.28: Nangka Yeso ka beka nyimi, na ka kala aka ale Urushalima.
19.29: Nangka ka amara ka kapeng ka Betapaji ka ko Beta nya, kane ya e daki zuwǝ o mati ma Zaitun, na ka tonga atoma kai a leere,
19.30: aka bekaa ne na, “Lyǝ na a kapeng kaanini a izi o ying. Ka o lyǝ o ying, eyo laka ka bana ka kurungzǝ ka yende ka o tera, kame a ta a tukǝ ozalame ne. Dinggǝ na kai ka e deene arakana.
19.31: Ondo oka wa pirkǝ ying na, ‘Eyaka eya dinggǝ a kai?’ E bekaana, ‘Ateokora aro ya yeme a kai.’ ”
19.32: Na andaaka atong ne ale, nane mana nangka Yeso ka bekaa ne.
19.33: Neya aza o dinggǝ kai naname, na ana kurungzǝ kame pirkǝ ne na, “Eyaka eya dinggǝ ka kurungzǝ kana?”
19.34: Nane bekaana, “Ateokora ya yeme a kai.”
19.35: Nane de ka kai ba Yeso, ane nata madibi mane azaa kurungzǝ kame, ane ana Yeso nane eke azaa kai.
19.36: Kaya aza o ale naname, na aromo nasa madibi mane azaa orona.
19.37: Nangka Yeso ka amara ka Urushalima araaka orona wa jipi o zuwǝ o mati ma Zaitun, na o kurkǝnǝng ana o tare okai a cake ne bore o kona oleba, ane saba Ashili kale ngmelo ajǝng aza e pate epa e moole kane laka.
19.38: Nane bekaana, “Ondo kona o leba ogomo oka waya deya a nyimi leze le Ateokora.” “O cikǝ a cammo aza shili, a o saba itǝ a Ashili.”
19.39: Pate ka nyimi na maParisa ma yende a nyimi o kurkǝnǝng aromo ne bekaa kai na, “Ondo baala, zurki a o kurkǝnǝng ana o tare o kane kome seete.”
19.40: Naka kabare na, “Eyang baala o ying, aromo na ne kome a seete, acale ka tokpwe to ai neya saba Ashili.”
19.41: Nangka ka amara, naka laka apeng a Urushalima, naka ruuzi aza ai.
19.42: Naka bekaana, “Aiya e rose o ngmeengme na epa eka aya gerame aza o cikǝ a cammo. A nanname a baasa aying.
19.43: A were ya deya ka ana o nyana o ying neyo ringgari ying ka o sowa lebonggo , ane kang eza o kara ka ying. A ana o tesa a geza a moole neyo ringgari ying a koruwa.
19.44: Neyo wonza aromo aying a pate. Neto kang baya lecale leyende leeka a soo tedo to ying ne aza le yende ne. A yo ya nyimia aza o bena eta e kabare o bena Ashili a de ka boze ying ne.” Yeso ka baale akwilǝ Ashili
19.45: Na ka lyǝ a atatara a akwilǝ Ashili, na ka bore o taranggaza ana o lisǝzǝ magororo.
19.46: Na ka beya ne na, “A wele na, ‘Akwilǝ ang a yo itǝ akwilǝ o beya angmǝ ka Ashili. Na ying e kuriyǝ ai obake akǝri.’ ”
19.47: Koonang lengme, ka baale aromo a akwilǝ Ashili. A ana magame ma Ashili ma moole, ka ana o baala angmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa, ka ana o togomo aza aromo ne gere orona o wongnga kai.
19.48: Nane dere nangka neyo wongnga kai, obena angmǝ a kai a embe anyong aromo a pate ka neya arame.

20.1: Ngmende a Yeso ka lyǝ atatara akwilǝ Ashili ka ka baale kanza aka zoole aromo aza orooka o lebo, na ana magame ma Ashili ma moole, ana o baala angmǝ aka Ashili nya Mosa ka anateandaasau ne de.
20.2: Nane bekaa kai na, “Bele ro orona legoone leeka o ezeze epa ena ne. Mana wa nyau legoone leena?”
20.3: Na Yeso kabare na, “Eyang eza ying be pirǝ, beleng na,
20.4: Legoone le ngmǝ a Yohana ondo batisma a suri a Ashili na, aromo ai?”
20.5: Nane beya tokpwe tone, nane laka o bekaana, “Te bekaana, ‘Wa suri a Ashili,’ a kayo bekaana, ‘Eyaka eta e kabare ka wai ne?’
20.6: Kanza te bekaana, ‘Wa suri aromo,’ aromo a cake neyo teza ro ka cale, o bekaana komana rose Yohana ondo o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili wai.”
20.7: Nane maare ko bekaa kai na, “Teta rosa araaka le suri ne ne.”
20.8: Na Yeso bekaa ne na, “Mima anta bele o ying ka legoone le mana eyang eza epa eka eya gonta me ne.” Angmǝ a gerpo aza ana ogole amea ne nyane a Ashili
20.9: Na Yeso ka lyǝ izi ka o baala aromo angmǝ a gerpo na, “Ondo wa rene amea waye ka ara o inabi, na wa nya ana ondo ogole arame a wa ale a begere a makeke ma yende, na wa rabo a saname.
20.10: Nangka a were o shende e inabi waye, na wa tong ozara wai oyende ana ogole me kawa mangka ayana o inabi me ba ne. Na ana ogole me ne ole wai, aane tarangga wai na wa kuri zora eyapa.
20.11: Na oromo me wa tong ozara o leere, na ana ogole me kang ola wai na o bora, aane eze wai epa ezǝng aane kang tarangga wai na wa kuri zora eyapa.
20.12: Na oromo me wa tong ozara o taaro, na ana ogole me ne ole wai aane juki wai aane were wai o yangga.
20.13: “Na ondo ara o inabi me wa bekaana, ‘Eya eyang ya naname? Eyang tonga kena kang ka lome kamea ang yeme, ang rose obena neyo tare kai.’
20.14: “Pate ka nyimi nangka ana ogole me ne laka kai nane bekaa tokpwe to ne na, ‘Kando kamea kayo jeka ocǝ me kaana, baya ate wong kai, a ocǝ ondo arame wa itǝ aoro.’
20.15: Nane wong kai ane tare e keze kai a malo ara inabi. “Eya ondo arame wayo ya ne?
20.16: Wayo deya ka wa wong ana ogole me, a wa nya ana ondo ara ame.” Nangka aromo ka neya akwilǝ a Ashili ne kone nyimi nane bekaana, “Kana Ashili baya nyimi aye ne.”
20.17: Na Yeso karene a yizi a dongdong aka pirkǝ na, “Eya bekazo ba ngmǝ epa ena a ana o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili ne wela? “ ‘Lecale leemea ana o sowa ne nyana, leya le itǝ leeme a waale a yeme me a were o sowa.’
20.18: Bekazo be angmǝ ana a beya, pate ondooka wa rizi baaza lecale leme a wayo jukǝ okpwe wai a wa poso a nyokonyoko. A lecale leme le taru a wai a were amea a yo core angmǝ azaa wai, a yo nyanta wai kawa itǝ na ma'ena.”
20.19: Aza o bekaana ne rose na angmǝ a gerpo na aza o bena neta ne kabare ka o baala o kai ne. Na ana o baala angmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa ka ana magame ma Ashili ma moole ne gere orona o meke o Yeso a saseya, nane kone boome ba aromo. Be pirǝ aza o arsaza emate makeke ba Ogomo Roma
20.20: Na ne gere orona o meke o kai kane ote kai ka ka rizi aza epa eka ka yo beka. Adorana ka lyǝ a taara te ogomo makeke mame. Nane nya aromo anyong a buru yende emate kane itǝ ana o kare o kai a yizi, na aromo me wore o bena ne aromo a rere ne. Na tong ne ba Yeso kane eze kai be pirǝ.
20.21: Andaaka atong, ne pirkǝ Yeso na, “Ondobaala, te rose o bena o beeze o kang baala e peng, o takang wore o bena o kala yeme a ondo ne, kanza o baale orona Ashili ba kap.
20.22: Wa rere o bena te are emate makeke a Ogomo ogong o Roma Kaisar na te bayai?”
20.23: Na Yeso ka ka rose anyong ane a buru naka bekaa ne na,
20.24: “Woreng na beyo bemate. O ululu ka leze le mana a aza beyo bemate me?”
20.25: Nane bekaana, “O Ogomo ogong o Roma Kaisar wai.” Naka bekaa ne na, “Nyimi waaza nyana Ogomo ogong o Roma Kaisar epa eka e Ogomo ogong o Roma Kaisar e, e nya Ashili epa e Ashili e.”
20.26: Nane ta cǝ orona o meke o kai ne aza epa eka ka beka arakaname a nyimi aromo. Na epa eme tere ne okpwe aza o kabare o kap o be pirǝ be ne, nane kome a set. O baala ka Yeso ka eze aza o era kai malo o gbwǝ
20.27: MaSadukiya ma yende, kane beeze na malo o gbwǝ a era ta era ne, ne deye a Yeso ka be pirǝ. Nane bekaana,
20.28: “Ondo baala, Mosa ondo o beya a ngmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili wa wele ro oroka o bena, ondo wa gbwǝ a wa baya ondaye zora ayana, wa gwara o bena orone o wai ana ondaye me kawa ngmeng wai ayana.
20.29: A bena, arone yende ne zene neya a sondaare. Ondo o bora a nyimi one wa ana ondaye na wa gbwi zora kena.
20.30: Na o leere wa ana ondaye me na wa gbwi zora kena.
20.31: Na o taaro one wa ana ondaye me, nyimia ne anza ondaye me a ale orone o sondaare nane gbwizi zora ayana.
20.32: O maare na ondaye me wa gbwi.
20.33: A lengme lo era andaaka ne gbwizǝ, wayo itǝ ondaye mana a nyimi one, nangka pate one a sondaare ne tukǝ o ana o wai?”
20.34: Na Yeso bekaa ne na, “Aromo a were ana andaleme anza andaye, andaye kanza ne aleze a todo.
20.35: Pate ka nyimi andaaka neya kap ka were name ane kang bare o era a malo gbwǝ, ne era neta ana andaye ne a andaye kanza ne era ane ta ale a todo ne,
20.36: ne era neta gbwǝ kanza ne, aza o bena ne itǝ na atoma a surǝ a zaa shili. Ne itǝ ayana Ashili, o bena ne era a malo o gbwǝ.
20.37: Eta e kabare a kap ne, Mosa wa wore o bena andaaka ne gbwǝ neyo era, wa wele epa eka Ashili a beke, a epa eka Ashili a beke naana, ‘Mea Ashili Ibraheng, ka Ashili Ishaku, a Ashili a Yakub.’
20.38: Ai Ashili ana o gbwǝ taza ne, ai Ashili a pate andaaka ne gbwǝ a neya tare o kai ka e edang, neye ka ebeene.”
20.39: Na ana ondo ba nyimi ana o baala angmǝ aka Ashili a Mosa ne bekaana, “Ondo baala ba bekaa kap.”
20.40: Ondo ta zene kanza kawa ama pirǝ o kai ne. Ondo oka Ashili a zake ka kala abuudu a Daoda belle
20.41: Na Yeso ka pirkǝ aromo a cak na, “Eyaka ana o baala angmǝ aka a Ashili a nya Mosa ne beeze na Ondooka Ashili a zake kena ka abuudu Daoda kai?
20.42: Daoda ka okpwe kai a nyimi o Seleera ka bekaana: “ ‘Ateokora wa bekaa Ateokora ong na, “Cikǝ a sara ore ong,
20.43: zongka ang ote ana o nyana o atau legoone lo na o taara atau tobona to.” ’
20.44: Daoda wa rare kai na, ‘Ateokora.’ Nyimia waaza a wiinia aka ta kala o bena kena ka abuudu a wai ne?”
20.45: A aromo a pate ya konaza, na Yeso ka bekaa ana o tare o kai na,
20.46: “Ezana a sauwo ka ana o baala angmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa, aza o ara okpwe one. Ne ambaza ma dibi ma moole ane yenga nyimi aromo, ane kang yeme a beye ne oko a nyimi ara ejamane . Kanza ane yeme a nya ne ara o cikǝ a rere ba nyimi madandaro ma o gwarzanang maYahuda, ka ara o cikǝ a rere ara o gwara.
20.47: Neya ana o lyeeza magogoro ma agbwǝri andaye, ane kang rabo a beya angmǝ ka Ashili adorana a laka ne. Abela aromo name Ashili a yo gǝǝzǝ ne ba cak.”

21.1: Yeso ka ara okpwe naka laka ana ocǝ yende aneya taara emate a nyimi ara le'eke le emate akwilǝ Ashili.
21.2: Naka kang laka kagbwǝri kandaye a ka tare eyo emate e batebate leere a nyimi ara le'eke leme kanza.
21.3: Na ka bekaana, “Eyang baala o ying epeng eme, epa eka kagbwǝri kandaye kaana ka tare ba nyimi me, e kale o dangareme ba pate.
21.4: Obena pate ana ocǝ name ane nya a baate a nyimi epa e cake ka neya ka e, kai kanza ba nyimi odera naka nya pate emate epaolya kai ka lenyong le yende.” Yeso ka baale epa eka eyo mane aromo kai
21.5: Ana ondo a nyimi ana o tarea kai neya beya angmǝ aza akwilǝ a Ashili, ka nangka a babara ai ka acale emamate, a magogoro maaka a nyaza mo gole akwilǝ me. Na ka bekaa ne na,
21.6: “Magogoro maana eya gonta me, a were ya deya ka lecale leyende ato baya le aza le yende zora o bacakare ne.”
21.7: Nane pirkǝ kai na, “Ondo baala, ngmǝyamea aya eza mapapa mana? Eya teyo laka ka te rose bena a were me a amara ko deya?”
21.8: Naka kabare na, “Doola na ka edang tana ondo wilǝrǝ ying ne. Obena aromo a cake ya deya ka leze leng, ane beye majakari na, ‘Mea Ondooka Ashili a zake,’ ane kang beya na, ‘A were o maare a amara.’ Tane tare ne ne.
21.9: E kang kona angmǝ o makara ka o ara anyong, tane kerke ne. Seeka a bore o ya a nyimi, a omaare tata izi.”
21.10: A wereme na Yeso bekaa ne na, “Makeke mayo eza okara ka makeke ma yende, a togomo teyo eza okara ka togomo te yende.
21.11: Adeze a yo zekimarnu a cake, ka e komo kanza ka makono ato ara cak. A yo kang laka mapa ma boome ka mapa maaka a ta a tukǝ o laka me ne a susǝ aza shili.
21.12: “Zongka nyimi, neyo gǝǝzǝ ying a cak. Neyo ale ka ying a madandaro ma o gwarzanang maYahuda ka core angmǝ aza o ying. A kang a aleze ka ying a tokwilǝ to pateze ana o eza epa e buru a yo pirǝ ying angmǝ a begeshe ba agomo a batebate ka a moole aza o bena ying e tareng.
21.13: Nyimia wayo itǝ orona o bele one angmǝ aza ong.
21.14: Aza nyimi terana anyong aying tana e eze madoola nangka eyo kabare angmǝ aza o ying ne,
21.15: eyang nya ying angmǝ a woma ka o rosa nangka ana o nyana o ying neto kang ama o itǝ ka ying ne.
21.16: Pate ana ate ka iini, arone a lome, ana akwilǝ aying, ka ejaa, neyo nyana, ane niyi ying ka wonze ana ondo o ying.
21.17: Komana wayo nyana ying aza o bena ying e tareng.
21.18: Pate ka nyimi lekpwi le yende okpwe o ying to wilǝ ne.
21.19: E itǝ ka legoone eng yang nya ying ebeene o dera o maro.
21.20: “A e laka apeng Urushalima à á ringgari ai ka ana o tesa geza a moole, e rose o bena a were o posa ai wa amara.
21.21: Aza nyimi andaaka neyo makeke ma Yahudiya aane song kane zale mayara, andaaka neya nyimi apeng ane suri, kanza andaaka neye a topepeng to batebate to yangga o Urushalima kana ne lyǝ a nyimi apeng ne.
21.22: A were name a yo itǝ o taasa aza andaaka ne eza epa e buru, kanza angmǝ aka ana o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili ne wele, a yo pena.
21.23: Wayo itǝ ka o zitǝ cake andaye aka neye ka e tumǝ ka andaye amea neya nyaza ayana maane a tomore tonname. O mungi Ashili wayo oko aza aromo ana, aane yo zitǝ jǝng.
21.24: A yo wonga ana ondo one ka o sagali, a yo kang beza odanggare one azara a ale a pate makeke ma lerambo le Ashili. A Urushalima a yo itǝ epa ma zelakong ara aworme ka neyo eza togomo ara o danggare one a ale a were aka neyo dukǝ bekazo be ne.
21.25: “A yo laka magogoro ma sau, ongme, oreka ka e werewere. Ara kaana a deze, aromo neyo kona o burǝ ane kang kona boome aza behoowo ka o tambalana lepong.
21.26: Aromo neyo kona boome aza epa eka ne laka eya oko a deze, o bena o bare o nyimi shili Ashili a yo zukarnǝ mai.
21.27: A were namea komana me wayo laka Kena ka Oromo aka ya deya a nyimi mawere ka o bare okai ka o gongnga kai o cake.
21.28: E bora o gonta magogoro mana, erana ba itǝ e ara tokpwe toying aza, aza o bena o boza o ying wa amara.”
21.29: Ka bele ne angmǝ gerpo na, “Laka na uti o saya ka mati ba pate.
21.30: Ne bora o sǝrsǝzǝ ma rane, eyo laka ka tokpwe toying na lekoze le amara.
21.31: Nyimia waaza, ba laka pate epa ena eya ale, e rose o bena togomo te Ashili te amara.
21.32: “Ang bele ying e peng eme, aromo a were ana neto gbwizǝ a pate ne zongka mapapa maana ma wore okpwe mai.
21.33: Azaa shili ka deze neyo maro angmǝ ang ato maro ne.
21.34: “Ekena teto. Kana e baya anyong aying aye maring ka o sosoza, kanza ka magogoro ma were anane. Kana e baya a lengme lenname le meke ying eta rosa ne.
21.35: Lengme lenname ya deya aza pate ondooka waya ka ebeene a pate lerambo le Ashili leena.
21.36: Ekena teto koonang a were, e beye angmǝ ka Ashili nangka eyo bisǝ a pate epa eka eya deya, kanza nangka eyo ama o itǝ a begeshe be kena ka Oromo ka o kona o leba.”
21.37: Koonang lengme Yeso ka ale akwilǝ Ashili kaka baale, a koonang lyǝlu aka kuri kaka maare lelyaare ba za oyara o Zaitun.
21.38: A aromo a cake gwarzanang akwilǝ Ashili koonang leleere kane koneze kai.

22.1: A were o gwarnang o rintǝ o dera o wonga ayana o bora maYahuda a Masar, wa amara,
22.2: ana magame ma Ashili ma moole ka ana o baala angmǝ aka Ashili nya Mosa ne gere orona omea neyo wonga Yeso. Ne gere o ya nyimi a ondo ta rosa ne ko bena neya kona boome ba aromo.
22.3: Na ogomo o bere o buru wa lyǝ ba Yahuda ka a rareze wai na Iskariyoti, waya nyimi atoma Yeso betuuru ka leere.
22.4: Nawa ale ana magame ma Ashili ma moole ka andaamoole ajawu akwilǝ a Ashili, nane gere nangka wayo nya ne Yeso.
22.5: Nane kone o leba ba cake, aane eke o bena neyo ara wai emate.
22.6: Na Yahuda kabare ka nyimi, na wa bore o gera orona oka wayo nya ne Yeso a aromo ta rosa ne. Yeso ka lye emete o maare ka atoma kai
22.7: Na lengme lo o gwarnang o rintǝ o dera o wonga ayana o bora maYahuda a Masar wa dukǝ ka a yo core Ashili ka kwete.
22.8: Na Yeso tong Biturusu, ka Yohana aka bekaa ne na, “Ale na ka e babare ro ara o gwarnang o rintǝ o dera o wonga ayana o bora maYahuda a Masar kate lye a nyimi me.”
22.9: Nane pirkǝ kai na, “Oya yeme ate babare e a baba?”
22.10: Naka kabare na, “E lyǝ apengme, eyo gwarnang ka ondaleme yende a wa ana o daka manyi. Tare na wai a ale akwilǝ ka waya lyǝ ne,
22.11: e bekaa ondo akwilǝ me na, ‘Kando ka o baala ka tonga ro kate pirkau na. Odo ageng ya baba, araaka eyang lya epaolya o gwarnang o rintǝ o dera o wonga ayana o bora maYahuda a Masar ka atoma ang ne?’
22.12: Wayo wore ying odo ogong oka waya aza o gungǝ, oka a eke e keeya a nyimi me. Arakaname eyo babara e keeya ne.”
22.13: Nane ale ane mana e keeya nangka Yeso ka bekaa ne. Nane babare epaolya o gwarnang o rintǝ o surǝ maYahuda a makeke ma Masar.
22.14: Nangka a were ame a dukǝ, na Yeso ka ale ka atoma kai, aane pitǝkǝlnǝ legwa ara o lya epaolya.
22.15: Na Yeso bekaa ne na, “Ma yeme o lya epaolya o gwarnang o rintǝ o dera o wonga ayana o bora maYahuda a Masar o na ka ying zongka ang lyǝ o zitǝ.
22.16: Eyang bele o ying, ma era ang takang lya e ne, seeka e laka ebelo e a e pena a nyimi togomo te Ashili.”
22.17: Naka jeke kagbwi, aka kone o leba Ashili aka bekaana, “Emba na epa eka eya nyimi kagbwi kaana ka e esoze a tokpwe to ying.
22.18: Eyang bele o ying, ma era ang takang sa kanza ba nyimi e buru o inabi ne seeka togomo te Ashili te de.”
22.19: Aka jeke o borode, naka kone o leba Ashili aka pose wai, aka nya ne aka bena, “Onna lepung lenga le a nya aza o ying lya na, ezezena nyimi e rintǝng.”
22.20: Nyimia kanza, malo o lya emete naka jeke kagbwi kame, aka bena, “Epa eka eya nyimi kagbwi kaana eye na otono osau ka wayo bora ka ma nyau mang a were aka a wonga, maaka a yo oka aza o ying.
22.21: Ang kang beka eyapa, arakana ondooka waya niyi ong a taara te andaaka ne nyaneng waya nyimi ara o lya epaolya ka mi.
22.22: Kena ka Oromo kayo gbwǝ nangka a beka, kanza ondooka wa niyi kai ana o nyana kai wa lyǝ udi.”
22.23: Na atoma kai ne bore o pirǝ tokpwe tone na, mana a nyimi aro ka wayo ya nyimi?
22.24: Na masanggo ere a nyimi one, aza o bena mana wayo itǝ ondo kala ogonga.
22.25: Na Yeso bekaa ne na, “Agomo aworme neta rose Ashili ne, ne anza ne magogoro ma dendeng, kanza andaaka ne eze togomo aza one ne rareze tokpwe tone na ana o kankama aromo.
22.26: Tana wa itǝ nyimi ba nyimi o ying ne. Mara ondoogong ba nyimi o ying a wa itǝ na ondobaate, ondoogong a nyimi o ying wa itǝ na ozara.
22.27: Mana kala o gongnga, ate akwilǝ ka a casa wai epaolya na, ozara oka wa arsezea? Ate akwilǝ oka casa wai epaolya tazane? A mi naana ba nyimi o ying na ozara o arsaza epaolya.
22.28: Yingnga andaaka e itǝ ka mi a nyimi o kona o zitǝ ong.
22.29: Nangka ate ang wa nyang legoone le togomo, nyimia ma nya ying,
22.30: adorana e lye e kang sa ara o lya epaolya a nyimi togomo tong kanza e cikǝ a tora te cikǝ togomo, e eze togomo ba za tokora betuuru ka e leere maYahuda.
22.31: “Biturusu, Biturusu, ogomo o bere o buru wa gere kedeya o ying a pate, wayo zeera ying nangka a zeere ma'ena ma o alkama, adorana a lope ying atoma ka e itǝ na masuni.
22.32: Ma bosa Ashili aza o Biturusu, nangka o kabare Ashili au wa to sawa ne. Malo oka ba kurǝ a mi, o kankama o dangare o ying ka neema ne kuri ara Ashili.”
22.33: Na Biturusu kabare na, “Ateokora, ma tera o bena eyang ale ka bo ara o tesa aromo kanza ka ara o gbwǝ ka bo.”
22.34: Na Yeso bekaana, “Ang belo, Biturusu, zongka o runǝ wa sene o ngmeengme, oyo sanggang ka taaro na ota rosanne.”
22.35: Na Yeso pirkǝ atoma kai na, “A were aka ma tong ying zora emate, zora epaolya, zora tekakau, e dera e yapa na?” Nane bekaana, “Teta te dera ne.”
22.36: Naka bekaa ne na, “Nannamena a were na a sara, eeya ka emate, ka epaolya e jeke ka e onte, kanza ondooka wata ka o sagali ne, a wa lishi o dibi wai kawa embe oyende ne.
22.37: Eyang bele o ying, angmǝ Ashili aka ondo o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili Ishaya wa wele a bena, ‘A gwaara kai ka ana madinǝ,’ wa itǝ o bena, waya pena ba za ong. Nyimia, epa eka a wele ba za ong eya za o penze.”
22.38: Na atoma kai ne bekaa kai na, “Laka, Ateokora, masagali ma leere maana.” Na Yeso kabare na, “Maa bare.” Yeso ka beye angmǝ ka Ashili oyara Zaitun
22.39: Yeso ka ale aza oyara Zaitun nangka ka mena ezazaa me, na atoma kai ale ka kai.
22.40: Nangka ka dukǝ rame, aka bekaa ne na, “Beyana angmǝ ka Ashili tana e rizi a nyimi o kedeya ogomo o bere o buru ne.”
22.41: Naka arnang ka ne na o ewa o wera lecale, naka girwǝ aka beya angmǝ ka Ashili.
22.42: Aka bekaana, “Ate, ba kabare o arang ka o zitǝ ona a deya ba za ong. Pate ka nyimi tana o tare ka o yeme ong ne, o yeme o waya aya tare me.”
22.43: Na otoma Ashili o zaa shili wa deya kai na wa kankama kai adorana ka cǝ legoone.
22.44: Aka ya aza o zitǝ, naka wale legoone lo beya ngmǝ ka Ashili ne, na malane susi a lepung le kai a ma tenkeze a deze na ma nyau.
22.45: Nangka Yeso ka ere ara o beya ngmǝ ka Ashili, naka kuri araaka atoma kai ne zene, aka mana ne ane umǝ ka o caro anyong cak, aza o bena ne zenga.
22.46: Naka bekaa ne na, “Eyaka eya malau? Era na ka e beye angmǝ ka Ashili adorana tana e rizi a nyimi o kedeya ogomo bere o buru ne.” Andaano maYahuda ne meke Yeso
22.47: Kaya nyimi o beya ngmǝ naname na leguki le aromo deya rame, a oromo o mea a beya wai na Yahuda, ondooka waya nyimi atoma a kai betuuru ka leere, wa kalea ne a izi. Nawa paka ting Yeso adorana wa gwara ongmǝ ka kai o wore o yeme,
22.48: na Yeso pirkǝ wai na, “Yahuda, o beya o ko ka ongmǝ wa itǝ orona o nya Kena ka oromo na?”
22.49: Nangka atoma a Yeso ne laka epa eka eya ale, nane bekaana, “Ateokora, te kweze ka masagali ma ro na?”
22.50: Na ondo one wa kpweene oto ozara ondo magame ma Ashili bedake na wa core.
22.51: Na Yeso bekaa ne na, “Kana ekang ya nanna ne.” Naka meke oto oromo me aka womza wai.
22.52: Na Yeso bekaa ana o baala ngmǝ Ashili a were a Mosa, ka ana o endaza akwilǝ Ashili, ka anateandasau, amea ne deya kazo kai, “E surǝ ka masagali, ka se benda ba meke ong na okǝri o womza aromo na?
22.53: Maye ka ying koonang lengme ba nyimi akwilǝ a Ashili, na eta mekeng ne. Nannamena a were a yingnga. Ka maring ya aza togomo.” Biturusu wa sangga o rosa Yeso
22.54: Nane meke Yeso ane ale ka kai ba akwilǝ ogomo magame ma Ashili. Na Biturusu tarezene a macangcang.
22.55: Nangka ne gwaara ola atatara ara o beya angmǝ me a pate aane cikǝ ara yende, na Biturusu cikǝ a wa kondo ola kaane.
22.56: Na kazara kagala ka yende a nyimi a agala ka neya eza ogole akwilǝ me ka laka Biturusu a cikǝ ating ola me, naka kare wai a yizi aka bekaana, “Ondo ona waye legwa ka Yeso.”
22.57: Na Biturusu sanggang kai, a wa bekaana, “Kandaye, anta rosa kai ne.”
22.58: Malo nyimi, a ondo wa kang deya na wa laka Biturusu na wa rose wai, a wa bekaana, “Bo ma oya nyimi one.” Na Biturusu kabare na, “Oromo, mi anta nyimi one ne.”
22.59: Malo o rabo a baate, na ondo kang bekaana, “Masanggo ta rene ne, oromo ona waye ka kai, wai oromo o makeke Galili waye.”
22.60: Na Biturusu kabare na, “Oromo, anta rosa epa eka oya beya me ne.” Waya aza o mara o beka nyimi naname na urunǝ wa sene.
22.61: Na Ateokora ringgarnu naka laka Biturusu. A were name na Biturusu wa rintǝ epa eka Ateokora bekaa wai o bena, “Zongka o runǝ wa sene o ngmeengme, oyo sanggang ka taaro.”
22.62: Nawa suri o yanga na wa ruuzi a jǝng aza epa eka wa ya. Ana le enda ne zeele Yeso
22.63: Ana o enda Yeso ne zeele kai, ane ole kai.
22.64: Nane pate a yizi kai, ane pirkǝ kai na, “Bele ro ondooka wa ceeto.”
22.65: Nane beye kai angmǝ buru a cak o zeela kai. Yeso a begeshe be andaano maYahuda
22.66: Ka o sana ra, na andaano maYahuda, neya, anateandasau, ka ana magame ma Ashili ma moole, ka ana o baala ngmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa nane gwarnang, ane ale ka Yeso ara o gwara one.
22.67: Nane bekaa kai na, “Boa Ondooka Ashili a zake na?” Naka kabare ka o bena, “Ma bele ying na, mia Ondooka Ashili a zake eto kabare ne,
22.68: kanza ma pirǝ ying na, ‘Mia mana?’ Eto kabareng ne.
22.69: A nanname a ale a izi, Kena ka Oromo kayo cikǝ o ara o re Ashili ondo legoone.”
22.70: Pate one nane bekaana, “Nyimi waaza, boa Kena ka Ashili na?” Naka kabare ne na, “Epa eka e beka nyimi waze.”
22.71: Nane bekaana, “Kai ka beka ka ongmǝ o kai, eya teya gera me kanza.”

23.1: Pate aromo kane gwarnang nane ere aane ale ka Yeso a begeshe be Ogomo Bilatus.
23.2: Nane bore o anza kai angmǝ na, “Te mana karomo kaana aka wilǝrǝzǝ aromo aro, aka beya ne na tana ne nya Ogomo ogong o Roma Kaisar emate makeke ne kanza aka beya okpwe kai na, kaya Ondooka Ashili a zake na ogomo.”
23.3: Na Ogomo Bilatus pirkǝ Yeso na, “Boa ogomo maYahuda na?” Na Yeso kabare na, “Ba bekaa kap.”
23.4: Na Ogomo Bilatus wa bele ana magame ma Ashili ma moole ka leguki le aromo na, “Mi anta ma cǝ epa e buru eka eyang meke me aza karomo kaana ne.”
23.5: Nane nyane epa eka wa bekaa ne lya izi ko beyana, “O baala kai wa ara anyong aromo a nyimi makeke maYahuda. Ka bore apeng Galili, naka deya ara kaana.”
23.6: Ka o kona nyimi, na Ogomo Bilatus pirkǝ na kai karomo ka makeke ma Galili kai na.
23.7: Nangka wa rose o bena Yeso ka suri a araaka Ogomo Hiridus waya togomo ne, na wa turki ne ara a Ogomo Hiridus me, a were name wai Ogomo Hiridus waya apeng Urushalima.
23.8: Nangka Ogomo Hiridus wa laka Yeso, na wa kone o leba a cak, o bena wa rabo ka o yeme o laka Yeso me, wa koneze oroka o bekaana, ka ezeze epa eka e kala begeshe ba aromo, na wa ya yeme o laka ebelo e.
23.9: Na Ogomo Hiridus pirkǝ Yeso aza angmǝ cak, na Yeso kata kabare ka eyapa ne.
23.10: Ana magame ma Ashili ma moole ka ana o baala angmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa nane itǝ arame aane beya ngmǝ ka o caro anyong aza Yeso ka o beyana, ka eza mapa ma buru.
23.11: Na ana Ogomo Hiridus ka ana o tesa geza a moole a wai, ne zeele kai kanza ane beye kai angmǝ a buru. Nane amba kai o dibi o togomo ane kuriyǝ kai ara Ogomo Bilatus.
23.12: A lengme lennamea Ogomo Bilatus ka Ogomo Hiridus ne itǝ ejaa, o bora neta ne ciisǝ a cammo a tokpwe tone ne.
23.13: Na Ogomo Bilatus rare andaano maYahuda, neya, ana magame ma Ashili ma moole, ka anate andaasau ka o dangare aromo a pate,
23.14: na wa bekaa ne na, “E deya ka karomo kaana aza o bena e beeze na ka wilǝrǝzǝ aromo kane nare o cikǝ o cammo. Ma pirǝ kai a begeshe be ying adorana ang cǝ o dera gaashe a kai, nanta ma cǝ epa e buru eka ma era ang meke aza kai ne.
23.15: Ogomo Hiridus ma wata wa cǝ epa e buru aza kai ne, waya wa ote na wa turki kai ara ong, karomo kaana kata ka ya eyapa o bare ka wong kai ne.
23.16: Aza nyimi, eyang ote ka ola kai ang pere kai.”
23.17: A Ogomo Bilatus waye ka o pere oromo yende ka a pate, a were o gwarnang o rintǝ o dera o wonga ayana o bora maYahuda a Masar omea ne mena ka o bosaza me.
23.18: Na aromo me ka le ngmelo le yende, beke a jǝng na, “Ale na ka karomo kaana ka e wong kai, a pere ro Barabas.”
23.19: A Barabas a pate wai ara ana o eza epa e buru aza o bekaana wa gereze bete a nyimi apengme, kanza azaa o wonga oromo.
23.20: Ogomo Bilatus waya yeme o perea Yeso, na wa kang bosa ne.
23.21: Nane lya izi ka o arsaza a ngmelo na, “A wong kai azaa uti o gendare. A wong kai azaa uti o gendare.”
23.22: Ka taaro naname ka Ogomo Bilatus beke angmǝ aane na, “Eya e? Karomo kaana kaya eya e buru? Me anta ma cǝ epa e buru ba kai ka e bare o wongnga kai ne. Eyang ote ka ole kai ang pere kai.”
23.23: Na aromo me ne ara lengmelo ajǝng o bena soona a wong kai aza uti o gendare.
23.24: Na Ogomo Bilatus kabare ka epa eka neya yeme me.
23.25: Nawa pere oromo oka a pate a nyimi akwilǝ ana o eza epa e buru, kawa gereze bete a nyimi apeng a wa kang wongnga ondo, waiya ne bose na a pere wai, a wa nya Yeso nangka neya yeme me kane wong kai. A gendare Yeso aza o uti
23.26: Nangka ana o tesa geza a moole neya ale ka Yeso, nane gwarnang ka Siman oromo o Siyarin a waya lyǝ apeng, nane meke wai ane ana wai uti o gendara aromo, a wa tare Yeso a dimǝ.
23.27: A aromo a cake tare kai, ka andaye yende kane kone egonegone ane kang ruuzi aza o ziyǝ ka Yeso ka ya kona me.
23.28: Na Yeso ringgarnu naka bekaa ne na, “Andaye o Urushalima, tana e ruuzi aza ong ne, ruuzi na aza tokpwe to ying ka ayana aying.
23.29: A were aya deya amea eyo bekaana, ‘Ondo kona o leba andaye amea neta ne tukǝ ngmenga ne, a bangi amea a ta ngmengzaza ne kanza a maane mame a ta a tukǝ o asaka mai ne.’
23.30: A were name “ ‘Neyo beka a mayara na, “Oko na aza aro.” A ma'owa na, “Pate ro.” ’ ”
23.31: Aka beke angmǝ a gerpo na, “Aromo ne eza mapa maana a were aka uti tata o nyaza, wayo itǝ nannia uti me wa waka?”
23.32: Aromo leere, ana o eza epa e buru a ale ka ne legwa ka Yeso adorana a wong ne.
23.33: Nangka ne dukǝ araaka beya ai na, “Ara macako ma okpwe” arakaname a gendare Yeso uti ne. Ka ana o eza epa e buru name, ondo o ara ore, a ondo o ara o guri.
23.34: Na Yeso bekaana, “Ate, kwizǝ epa e buru ana o nyana ong, o bena neta rosa na mana mi ne.” Ane eke madibi ma kai a tera one nane laka mana waya jeka.
23.35: Aromo ne itǝ ane gonte, anda gong ane nane zeele kai, ane beya na, “Ka boza na ondo, aka boze okpwe kai ka ya kaaya ondo boza oka Ashili a zake.”
23.36: Ana o tesa a geza a moole ne de nane zeele kai. Ane niyi kai manyi ma marara ma yana inabi,
23.37: ane beya kai na, “Boa baya ogomo maYahuda, boza okpwe o.”
23.38: Aza ka okpwe kai a wele na, “KANDO KAANA KAYA OGOMO MAYAHUDA.”
23.39: Ondo a nyimi ana o eza epa e buru me ka a gendare ne ka Yeso na wa zeele kai, a wa bekaana, “Boa baya Ondooka Ashili a zake, boza okpwe o ka ro.”
23.40: A ondo eza epa e buru o leere me wa zurki a wai na, “O kone boome ba Ashili sang, bo ka a gendare uti ona ka kai?
23.41: Ro teya eesa o poba oka wa gwara ka ro, kai ka ta ka ya epa e buru ne.”
23.42: A wa bekaana, “Yeso rintǝng a were aka ba lyǝ a nyimi togomo to.”
23.43: Na Yeso kabare wai na, “Eyang bele o maganggang, o ngmeengme na oyo cikǝ ka mi ara a lebo ang aza shili.” O gbwǝ o Yeso
23.44: A tera letereme na ye maring a kuruwǝ a makeke mame, nama dukǝ o gendarono ongme,
23.45: na ongme wata nya masanto ne. Na epa o wobe ara o kala be sangsang akwilǝ Ashili wa daro a tera.
23.46: Na Yeso ka ara lengmelo a jǝng naka bekaana, “Ate, ma nyau ebeene eng a nyimi taara to.” Ka o bekaa nyimi, aka windi ebeene kai o mare a ka gbwi.
23.47: Nangka ondo tesa a geza a moole o gong a Roma wa laka epa eka ka ya, na wa saba Ashili a wa bekaana, “Dongdong karomo kaana kando ka o dera madinǝ kai.”
23.48: Na aromo aka neya gonta epa eka aya eza me arame, nane kuri akwilǝ ka o ola begeshe be ne a nyimi o kona o buru.
23.49: Pate aromo aka ne rose Yeso ka andaye amea ne tare kai a sura a makeke ma Galili, nane itǝ a macangcang ane gonte epa eka eya ale. O taasa Yeso
23.50: Ondo wa zene ka a beya wai na Yusupu, ka waye a nyimi andaano maYahuda, oromo me waye ka edang, a wa kone boome ba Ashili,
23.51: wata wa kabare ka epa eka andaano maYahuda ne eze ne. Wa de a wa suri a makeke ma Yahudiya apeng a Arimatiya a waya za o enda togomo to Ashili.
23.52: Nawa ale ba Ogomo Bilatus na wa bose wai na wa nya wai lepung le Yeso.
23.53: Nawa jipǝrǝ lepung le kai, a wa pate le ka betu a wa ote le ocau oka a coo o cale omea a ta a tukǝ o eza matasokong a wai ne.
23.54: Lengme leme lo babarono adorana a lyǝ a lengme lo teeseke ka o bosa Ashili maYahuda.
23.55: Andaye amea ne tare Yeso a surǝ a makeke ma Galili, nane ale ka Yusupu adorana ne laka araaka o cau me wa zene ka nangka a eke lepung le Yeso leme.
23.56: Nane suri akwilǝ, ane babare manao ma o waze o lebo. A lengme lo teseke nane teseke, nane teseke nangka angmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa a bekaana a eze.

24.1: A lelere aping o lengme le o bora, na andaye me ale ocau me ka magogoro ma owaze o lebo kane babare wai.
24.2: Nane mana a kinkǝri ocale ome a waya bengmǝ bo ocau me,
24.3: Nangka ne lyǝ a nyimi me, nane ta mana lepung le Yeso Ateokora ne.
24.4: Nangka neya madoola aza nyimi, a saseya na andaleme leere suri ating one, aane amba madibi ma o wonza a yizi.
24.5: A nyimi boome na andaye me tunggunǝ tokpwe tone a deze, na aromo me bekaa ne na, “Eyaka eya gera ondo ebeene a nyimi andaaka ne gbwizǝ?
24.6: Kata arakana ne, ka era. Rintǝna epa eka ka bekaa ying a makeke ma Galili,
24.7: ‘O sara ta zene ne a yo nya Kena ka Oromo a taara te aromo madinǝ kane wong kai azaa uti o gendare, a lengme lo taaro aka ere.’ ”
24.8: Na andaye me ne rintǝ angmǝ Yeso.
24.9: Nangka ne kuri aane suri ocau me, nane bekaa pate a atoma a Yeso betuuru ka o yende name, ko dangare aromo pate epa name.
24.10: Ana Mariya ka mea beya kai na Magadala, ka Yowana, a Mariya iini Yakubu, ka o dangare andaye, nane bele atoma kai epa eka eze.
24.11: Na atoma Yeso ta kabare epa eka andaye name ne bele ne ne, o bena angmǝ ane a ta orona ne.
24.12: Na Biturusu ere ba wup ka tesong a wa ale o ocau me. Ko dukǝ a wa tunggunu, a wa gokareke nyimi ocau me, na wa laka betu beeka a pate kai ne à á eke a sara yende. Na wa kuri akwilǝ ka madoola ma epa eka eya ale. Ana o tare Yeso a leere orona Imawus
24.13: A lengme lenname, ana o tare a Yeso anda leere neya teweno to ale a kapeng ka yende ka beya kai na Imawus, kamea kata ewa maleo ne ka apeng Urushalima.
24.14: Neya dano aza epa eka eya ale.
24.15: Aneya za o dano naname, na Yeso okpwe kai paka ne aka lya izi ko yenga ka ne.
24.16: A Ashili a pate ne o rosa kai.
24.17: Naka bekaa ne na, “Eya dano aza eya a nyimi teweno tane?” Nane itǝ ara yende aane caro a mainu.
24.18: Na ondo a nyimi one ka a beya wai na Kiliyabas wa pirkǝ kai na, “Boa ayende ogeng a apeng Urushalima ko ta rosa epa eka eya ale a tomore teena ne na?”
24.19: Naka pirkǝ ne na, “Eya ya ale?” Na ne bekaana, “Epa eka e mana Yeso ko Nazarat. Kai kando ka o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili, angmǝ akai aye ka legoone, a magole ma kai a begeshe ba Ashili ka aromo ma moole.
24.20: Kanza ana magame ma Ashili ma moole ka andaano a makeke ne core ngmǝ o wong kai aane gendare kai uti.
24.21: Ro tese eke a lenyong o bekaana, kaya kayo boza maYahuda ka pere ne. Eya kang tata, wa amara ka tomore te taaro naana aza epaana eya ale.
24.22: Bangka nyimi andaye yende a nyimi aro ne nya ro epa e mole, ne ale o ocau me a leleere aping,
24.23: pate ka nyimi neta ne mana lepung le kai ne. Nane de aane bekaa ro na ne laka Atoma Ashili o zaa shili nane bekaa ne na ebeene e kuri a kai kanza.
24.24: Na ana ondo a nyimi aro, ne ale o ocau me nane mana nangka andaye me ne beka, aane ta laka lepung le Yeso me ne.”
24.25: Na Yeso bekaa ne na, “Ying a rara, andaaka anyong ane ta rosaza eyapa a saseya ka ne kabare pate epa eka ana o beya a ngmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili ne wela angmǝ Ashili ne.
24.26: A samba o bekaame na Ondooka Ashili a zake kayo zitǝ a marona cake, malo nyimi aka lyǝ ara o kona o leba kai a rere.”
24.27: Naka baale ne pate epa eka Mosa ka ana o beya a ngmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili ne wele aza Ondooka Ashili a zake.
24.28: Nangka ne amara ka kapeng ka yende kamea neya ale ne, na Yeso kaye na kaya lya izi ka teweno.
24.29: Nane paka kai ane nyitǝmǝrǝnu a bose kai na, “Cikǝ ka ro, o lyǝlu waya, a were o taru ongme waya.” Naka tare ne aka cikǝ ka ne.
24.30: Nangka ne cikǝ aro lya epaolya, naka jeke o borode, aka kone o leba Ashili, aka poseze naka areseze ne.
24.31: A arakanamea a Ashili a pari ne o rosa kai, a malo nyimi naka wili ane.
24.32: Nane bekaa tokpwe tone na, “Eyaka anyong aro a ta a pǝrnu ka te rose ko kona o leba a were aka kaya beya ngmǝ ka ro orona, aka ya baala aro angmǝ Ashili ne?”
24.33: A were name ne ere nane kuri apeng a Urushalima nane mana atoma betuuru ko yende ko dangare ana o tare o kai,
24.34: a neya beya na, “Nyimi waze, Ateokora ka era aka wore okpwe kai ara Siman Biturusu.”
24.35: Na aromo leere name ne baale pate epa eka e mane ne orona, ka nangka ne rose kai a were aka ka arseze ne o borode. Ogole oka Yeso ka nya ana o tare okai
24.36: A neya za o beya ngmǝ aza nyimi, na Yeso okpwe kai ka itǝ a tera one aka beye ne oko na, “O cikǝ a cammo tare ka ying.”
24.37: Na boome moke ne anyong ane kerkeze, aza o bekaana ne laka bebuu.
24.38: Naka bekaa ne na, “Eyaka eya kona boome nanna? Eyaka eta e kabare ka Ashili anyong aying ne?
24.39: Solekena manyuwǝ a taara ka tobona tong. Mea kai ko okpwe ong. Mekenna ka e kone, bebuu ta ya ka enama ka cako ne, nangka me ang zene.”
24.40: Nangka ka beke nyimi, aka wore ne taara te kai ka tobona tome.
24.41: Ne tata ko dera o kabare anyong o bekaana neya kona o leba ka epa e moole, naka pirkǝ ne na, “Eya ka epaolya ara kaana na?”
24.42: Nane nya kai bekwala bemea a eesa,
24.43: Naka embe be aka lye, aneya gonta kai.
24.44: Naka bekaa ne na, “Epa ena ma bekaa ying a were aka ma tata ka ying: Eyo pena nangka a wele aza ong a nyimi ngmǝ aka Ashili a nya Mosa, ka ana o beya angmǝ ka mawo ma Ashili, ka Seleera.”
24.45: Naka pari madoola mane, nane rose angmǝ Ashili ka a wele.
24.46: Kanza aka bekaa ne na, “Epa ena a wela, na Ondooka Ashili a zake kayo zitǝ ka wong kai aka ere a nyimi o ocau a lengme lo taaro,
24.47: kanza oroka o kurǝ a Ashili Ka o kwizǝ madinǝ waya a yo beya a nyimi leze le kai a pate lerambo le Ashili a bore apeng Urushalima.
24.48: Yingnga andaaka e laka ka eyo baala ana ondo.
24.49: Eyang tonga o ying ka epa eka Ate wa beka. Cikǝ na a nyimi apeng zongka ang nya ying legoone le obere o rere o suri aza shili.” Yeso ka zale zaa shili
24.50: Naka sǝǝrǝ ne a malo peng Urushalima, a kulu kapeng ka Betanya, aramea ka ara taara to kai aza shili aka kare ne o kona o leba.
24.51: Malo o kare one o leba, naka arnang ka ne, a ana kai a ale azaa shili.
24.52: Nane tunggunu ane nya kai togomo to kai, ane kuri apeng Urushalima ko kona o leba o cake.
24.53: Nane cikǝ akwilǝ Ashili koonang lengme, ane saba Ai.
